articles.title: UGC NET June 2026 application correction window opens tomorrow at ugcnet.nta.nic.in; check steps to edit your form here

The examination is crucial for JRF, Assistant Professor appointments, and PhD admissions in Indian institutions.

This unique observance helps reduce malefic planetary influences and karmic burdens through rituals like Vishnu Sahasranama, Tulsi mantra chanting, and water donation, fostering wisdom, intuition, and ancestral blessings.

articles.title: Google’s AI Search may be overthinking things, just ask ‘disregard’
articles.description: Google’s redesigned AI-powered Search is facing criticism after users noticed bizarre results for the word “disregard”. Instead of quickly showing dictionary links, the new interface fills the screen with an unnecessary AI-generated response. The moment has sparked fresh debate over whether AI is making Search smarter or simply more complicated.

articles.title: Uber weighs higher bid for Delivery Hero: FT
articles.description: Uber's board met to discuss increasing its offer for Delivery Hero after a major shareholder rejected a bid valuing the German firm at over 11.5 billion euros. Uber CEO Dara Khosrowshahi previously offered 33 euros per share, but a larger shareholder was rebuffed with a 38 euros per share proposal.

articles.title: Post-Iran war panic? US fast-tracks Patriot overhaul amid shortages, 'failures' in Mid-East
articles.description: The U.S. Army has awarded Lockheed Martin a $61 million contract for two important Patriot air defense upgrades, moves designed to address one of the system’s best-known operational weaknesses. Reporting says the package includes a new containerized launcher and the RIG-360 guidance system, which together are meant to give PAC-3 interceptors a true 360-degree engagement capability instead of the current limited sector coverage.

articles.title: Save $300 on Apple's M5 Pro MacBook Pro with 48GB RAM today only
articles.description: Save $300 on Apple's latest 14-inch MacBook Pro with an upgrade to the M5 Pro 18C CPU/20C GPU chip and boost to 48GB RAM. The flash deal ends today. Save $300 on a 14-inch MacBook Pro with 48GB RAM - Image credit: Apple Apple's M5 Pro 14-inch MacBook Pro was released in March 2026, but a popular configuration is already marked down heavily during B&H's flash sale that ends today. Save $300 on this M5 Pro model that has an 18-core CPU with a 20-core GPU, an upgrade from the standard 15-core CPU and 16-core GPU. It also has 48GB of RAM, double that of the standard 24GB found in the entry model. Rounding out the key specs is a 1TB SSD. articles.title: Chinese astronaut to spend a full year in orbit as Beijing ramps up Moon race
articles.description: China is launching a three-man space flight to its Tiangong space station Sunday, where one astronaut will remain in orbit for a full year to prepare for future flights to the Moon. Beijing has said it aims to send a crewed mission to the Moon by 2030, having poured billions into its space programme over the past three decades.

articles.title: CBSE warns students against fake circular on revaluation, photocopy process
articles.description: CBSE has dismissed a viral circular claiming that the 2026 photocopy and revaluation process has been cancelled due to technical issues. The Board called the notice fake and urged students and parents not to trust rumours circulating on social media. CBSE advised everyone to verify examination-related information only through its official website and authorised platforms.
